reasons: Based on the visual evidence, the dog appears to be a young adult in its physical prime. The most telling cue is the condition of the teeth shown in the close-up; the visible canines and incisors are very clean and white with no apparent tartar accumulation or blunting, strongly suggesting an age of 1 to 3 years. The dog's eyes are bright and clear with no signs of cloudiness. There is completely no age-related greying around the dark muzzle, chin, or eyes. Finally, the dog exhibits a fully developed, athletic, and well-muscled physique with a healthy, vibrant coat, consistent with a young dog of roughly 2 years of age.
